There are:

1. TUI/Omen hairs + Open face + Closed face
2. Ultra Ego Goku hairs + Face 
3. Holdable Kamehameha layered clothing item (only works with the Strong Body Dynamic arms and Endoskeleton torso)
4. 3 Auras that are best used for this MUI Goku avatar. 

To find all of these add-ons, please check the link below.
